site_subtitle: The great opera stories — told for everyone
welcome_text: Opera is theatre, music, poetry and scenography all at once. Love, jealousy, betrayal, death, revenge, redemption. Choose a composer and begin the journey.

seo_home_title: Opera Guide — The Great Works of Classical Opera
seo_home_description: Explore Mozart, Verdi, Puccini and the great composers. Plots, characters and famous arias from the most celebrated operas in history.
